Toy Story 3 the Video Game Rated USA Released date
The "Toy Story 3" video game was rated "E for Everyone" by the Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB). The release date for the game in the USA was June 15, 2010.
Toy Story 3 the Video Game Rated UK Released date
The "Toy Story 3" video game was also rated "PEGI 7" in the United Kingdom. The release date for the game in the UK was June 18, 2010.
Rio the Video Game Rated USA Released date

The "Rio" video game was rated "E10+" by the Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) in the USA. 
The release date for the game in the USA was April 12, 2011.
Rio the Video Game Rated UK Released date
The "Rio" video game was rated "PEGI 3" in the United Kingdom. The release date for the game in the UK was April 15, 2011.
Rio the Video Game Rated AU Released date

I apologize, but I couldn't find the specific rating and release date for the "Rio" video game in Australia. It would be best to consult an official gaming resource or the Australia Classification Board for the accurate information.
Rio the Video Game Rated CA Released date

I apologize for any confusion, but I couldn't find specific information regarding the rating and release date of the "Rio" video game in Canada. To obtain accurate information, it is recommended to refer to official gaming resources or the Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) for Canada.
Tangled the Video Game Rated CA Released date
The "Tangled" video game was rated "E for Everyone" by the Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) in Canada. The release date for the game in Canada was November 23, 2010.
Tangled the Video Game Rated USA Released date

The "Tangled" video game was also rated "E for Everyone" by the Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) in the USA. The release date for the game in the USA was November 23, 2010, which coincides with the Canadian release date.
Tangled the Video Game Rated UK Released date

I apologize, but I couldn't find the specific rating and release date for the "Tangled" video game in the United Kingdom. To obtain accurate information, it is recommended to refer to official gaming resources or the Pan European Game Information (PEGI) system for the UK.
Despicable Me Songs

Here are some popular songs from the "Despicable Me" movies:

1. "Happy" by Pharrell Williams
2. "Bad" by Michael Jackson
3. "I'm Having a Bad, Bad Day" by Pierre Coffin
4. "Despicable Me" by Pharrell Williams
5. "Just a Cloud Away" by Pharrell Williams
6. "Boogie Fever" by The Sylvers
7. "Fun, Fun, Fun" by Pharrell Williams
8. "Yellow Light" by Pharrell Williams
9. "Minions Mambo" by The Minions
10. "Prettiest Girls" by Pharrell Williams

Please note that the song selection may vary depending on the specific movie in the "Despicable Me" franchise.
Spongebob Songs

Here are some popular songs from the "SpongeBob SquarePants" TV show and movies:

1. "F.U.N. Song" by SpongeBob SquarePants and Plankton
2. "Ripped Pants" by SpongeBob SquarePants
3. "Sweet Victory" by David Glen Eisley
4. "Best Day Ever" by SpongeBob SquarePants
5. "Underwater Sun" by The Soft Pinks
6. "Goofy Goober Rock" by SpongeBob SquarePants and Patrick Star
7. "Campfire Song Song" by SpongeBob SquarePants and Patrick Star
8. "The Bubble Song" by SpongeBob SquarePants
9. "Now That We're Men" by SpongeBob SquarePants and Patrick Star
10. "The Best Day Ever" by SpongeBob SquarePants

These are just a few examples, as there are many more songs featured in the "SpongeBob SquarePants" series and movies.
